'''âzh-ng-th-w''' ('''kazhangthewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kype|kype]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kype|kype]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-ng-th-w
|-
! Lemma
| kazhangthewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thizhangthewoko || jizhangthewoko || shizhangthewoko || kizhangthewoko
|-

|-

|-

''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
